entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum Bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for combining ability and recurrent selection

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used over five cycles to improve traits in sorghum populations

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average effect of a parent in combining with other parents, often associated with additive genetic effects

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of the observed hybrid performance from the expected performance based on GCA

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the grains produced

entities.name: PANICLE WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the sorghum panicle

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the sorghum panicle

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one hundred seeds

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: Various traits that contribute to the overall grain yield

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical analysis used to determine GCA and SCA effects

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for growing the hybrids

entities.name: LINE X TESTER MATING SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific mating system used for combining ability analysis

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: One of the sites where the sorghum hybrids were grown

entities.name: BHAVANISAGAR
entities.description: One of the sites where the sorghum hybrids were grown

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The Kharif season during which the crop was grown at ICRISAT Center

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The season during which the crop was grown at Bhavanisagar

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The water management condition provided during the summer season at Bhavanisagar

entities.name: ADDITIVE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects that contribute to the general combining ability of a trait

entities.name: SELECTION GAIN
entities.description: The progress made in trait improvement per cycle of selection
